events.text: Assessed the pre-entry gas monitor readings (O2 20.7%, LEL 2%, H2S 3 ppm, CO 5 ppm) — all individually within OSHA 1910.146 acceptable entry limits. However, since only a mid-depth reading was taken on a vessel entry, top/bottom stratification testing is still required before the permit can be fully authorized. Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json` with decision `needs_more_info`.
